Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Nine]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — Nine is a sun-tanned, weathered man with dark hair in tiny braids and a leather eyepatch over his right eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — Nine carries a hammer that is an Awakened weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — Nine and Eight do not use their real names on this trip.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — Nine and Eight wear a gold crest on their shirts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — Nine is one of the Champions on Calder's ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — Nine is a one-eyed man with a scarred back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — Nine was laid on a bunk inside the cabin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 9''' — Nine is one of Urzaia's brother Champions and is currently recovering from burns.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
